name: VERA Tool Exam Tier-2 Scenarios
description: Inference and chain scenarios for Professor-style tool competency validation.

scenarios.prompt: How many minutes remain until the next UTC hour? Show one equation and final number.
Suggest one safe workspace path for storing long-term learning notes and justify why that path is allowed.
Give me a concise summary of the Model Context Protocol using both broad web information and encyclopedia context.
Generate an image of a calm autumn forest stream and return the resulting asset path or URL.
Generate a short serene forest-stream loop video and return the resulting asset path or URL.
Read README.md and create tmp/tool_exam_probe.txt with a one-sentence summary of Vera operator entry points.
Store a short memory marker about tool exams, then recall it and reply PASS or FAIL.
